com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXCavity

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXAbstractCavityObjectsHolder, IXAbstractPin, IXConnectivityObject, IXObject, IXPin<IXAbstractPinList>, IXWriteableObject
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IXRefinedCavity

    public interface IXCavity
extends IXAbstractCavityObjectsHolder
    Interface for accessing the owner, mated device pin and mated connector cavity of a connector pin.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods Deprecated Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.util.Set<? extends IXCavityDetail> getCavityDetailObjects()
      Get the details associated with this cavity.
      java.util.Set<IXCavityDetail> getCavityDetails()
      Get the details associated with this cavity.
      IXCavityPlug getCavityPlug()
      Deprecated. 
      - replaced by getPinPlug()
      java.util.Set<IXAbstractPin> getFunctionalPins()
      Get the functional pins (Capital Logic Design pins) associated to this cavity.
      IXBlockPin getMatedBlockPin()
      Get the block pin mated to this cavity.
      java.util.Set<? extends IXCavity> getMatedCavities()
      Get the cavities mated to this cavity.
      IXCavity getMatedCavity()
      Deprecated. 
      instead use IXAbstractPin.getConnectedPins() which supports both single and multi-mating
      IXDevicePin getMatedDevicePin()
      Deprecated. 
      instead use IXAbstractPin.getConnectedPins() which supports both single and multi-mating
      IXCavityPlug getPinPlug()
      Gets the cavity plug in this cavity (if any)

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXAbstractCavityObjectsHolder

        getAdditionalComponents

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXAbstractPin

        getConductors, getConnectedPins, getInternalLinks, getOwner, getSignals

        getAttributeSetter

        getAssembly, getDesign, getInstances, getInstances

    • Method Detail

      • getCavityPlug

        IXCavityPlug getCavityPlug()
        Deprecated. - replaced by getPinPlug()
        Gets the cavity plug in this cavity (if any)
        Returns:
        the cavity plug (if any)

      • getPinPlug

        IXCavityPlug getPinPlug()
        Gets the cavity plug in this cavity (if any)
        Specified by:
        getPinPlug in interface IXAbstractCavityObjectsHolder
        Returns:
        the cavity plug (if any)

      • getMatedDevicePin

        IXDevicePin getMatedDevicePin()
        Deprecated. instead use IXAbstractPin.getConnectedPins() which supports both single and multi-mating
        Get the device pin mated to this cavity.
        Returns:
        the mated device pin. If this is not mated to any device pin "or" the mated device pin is in turn mated to multiple pins, this method returns "null"

      • getMatedBlockPin

        IXBlockPin getMatedBlockPin()
        Get the block pin mated to this cavity.
        Returns:
        the block pin if it exists, null otherwise.

      • getMatedCavity

        IXCavity getMatedCavity()
        Deprecated. instead use IXAbstractPin.getConnectedPins() which supports both single and multi-mating
        Get the cavity mated to this cavity. The result can be either a device connector pin if this is a harness connector or another harness connector pin if this is an inline half.
        Returns:
        the mated cavity if it exists. If no mated cavity exists "or" if the mated cavity is a device connector which represents a device pin and if this device pin is in turn mated to multiple pins, this method returns null.

      • getMatedCavities

        java.util.Set<? extends IXCavity> getMatedCavities()
        Get the cavities mated to this cavity.
        Returns:
        the set of mated cavities if any or empty set otherwise. The specific number and type of mated cavities that can be mated to a given cavity depend on the pin type and what it is connected to they can also change in the future as design data model gets expanded.

      • getCavityDetails

        java.util.Set<IXCavityDetail> getCavityDetails()
        Get the details associated with this cavity. There can be multiple cavity details for different option expressions on a composite design. Different cavity detail might be applicable to different derivatives
        Returns:
        Set of cavity details.

      • getFunctionalPins

        java.util.Set<IXAbstractPin> getFunctionalPins()
        Get the functional pins (Capital Logic Design pins) associated to this cavity. A cavity can have functional pins from Capital Logic design associated to it in Capital Integrator Design.
        Returns:
        Set of associated functional pins if any, an empty Set otherwise.

      • getCavityDetailObjects

        java.util.Set<? extends IXCavityDetail> getCavityDetailObjects()
        Get the details associated with this cavity. There can be multiple cavity details for different option expressions on a composite design. Different cavity detail might be applicable to different derivatives
        Specified by:
        getCavityDetailObjects in interface IXAbstractCavityObjectsHolder
        Returns:
        Set of cavity details.
